# Guardian Protection

> Guardian Protection is a Life Insurance & Family Protection serving Milton, GA. Service area: statewide. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.

## About

- **Business:** Guardian Protection
- **Industry:** Life Insurance & Family Protection
- **Primary location:** Milton, GA
- **Also serving:** Alpharetta, Woodstock, Roswell, Peachtree Corners, Atlanta, Canton
- **Website:** https://guardianprotectionlife.com
- **Blog:** https://localblog.guardianprotectionlife.com/blog/
- **Phone:** +17703010711
- **Voice:** Professional

## Topics We Cover

Life Insurance & Family Protection

## Content Cadence

- Monday: SEO articles targeting local search queries
- Wednesday: Local authority content (best-of, how-to, pricing guides)
- Thursday: GEO/AEO content optimized for AI answer engines
